channel.title: T261 shrdlu Source A
channel.description: T261 URL-first cross-source dedupe E2E fixture source A.

item.title: T261 shared URL story from source A
item.description: Source A carries the shared canonical URL with its own source-local GUID.

item.title: T261 source A same GUID unique URL
item.description: Source A uses a GUID that source B also uses, but the canonical URL is different.
